_comment: Single source of truth for the bundled sops binary. The five @keyshelf/sops-* platform packages and the main package.json optionalDependencies all derive their version from `sopsVersion`. Versioning philosophy: track the upstream sops version (clef-sh style), because the bundled binary is third-party sops, not keyshelf itself. The `tag` is the getsops/sops GitHub release the binaries are downloaded from; `binaries` maps each {platform}-{arch} to its release asset name and the SHA256 the build verifies before packaging (copied from the release's sops-<tag>.checksums.txt).
